name: SphereCore Survival
short_description: A top-down survival action game where you shoot, dodge, and upgrade to survive endless waves of deadly spheres.
detailed_description:
SphereCore Survival is a fast-paced top-down survival game where you're dropped into an arena swarming with hostile spheres. There’s no story, no distractions—just you, your weapons, and an endless onslaught of enemies. Survive as long as you can through increasingly brutal waves, rack up massive kill counts, and push your reflexes to the limit.

Each wave gets harder. More enemies. Faster spawns. No breaks. Your only chance is to stay moving, keep firing, and upgrade your tools of destruction to keep up with the chaos.

Key Features:

  • Endless Waves: Face thousands of enemies across escalating levels of difficulty.

  • Pure Action: No filler—just raw, satisfying combat.

  • Minimalist Visuals: Clean top-down design lets you focus on the chaos.

  • Upgrades & Powerups: Enhance your survival potential as the intensity ramps up.

  • Optimized Mayhem: Built for smooth performance, even when the screen is packed.

If you enjoy intense survival gameplay and the thrill of wiping out overwhelming odds, SphereCore Survival is your arena.
